message:
test(regex_cache): Add comprehensive RegexQuery LRU cache tests (Opt 5.3)

Add 14 tests for the RegexQuery caching system:
- Equivalence: Verify cache enabled/disabled returns identical results
- Cache behavior: Repeated queries, pattern independence
- Thread safety: Concurrent reads, different patterns, read/write contention
- Rollback: CASS_REGEX_CACHE=0 bypass verification
- Edge cases: Empty patterns, regex metacharacters, unicode, long patterns

Tests use suffix (*handler) and substring (*config*) patterns to exercise
the RegexQuery cache path. Thread safety tests create separate SearchClient
instances per thread (pointing to same index) to stress the global cache.

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-ktvx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
